top_signals.title: World Underestimating Iran War Impact on LNG, Says Woodside CEO
top_signals.summary: The world is underestimating how long the impact of the Iran war will last on global supply of liquefied natural gas, according to Australia’s top exporter of the fuel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Google gives first glimpse of new AI glasses ahead of fall launch
top_signals.summary: At its annual developers conference, Google offered a first look at its audio smart glasses that will be available later this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Arsenal crowned Premier League champions after Man City draw
top_signals.summary: City had to win to take the fight to the final day but fell short and can no longer catch its rival, which has ended a six-year trophy drought.
